Problem: The stroke recovery assistant supports patients during home rehabilitation. Each patient has a profile and follows a recovery plan assigned by a therapist. A doctor can review progress reports and update clinical recommendations. The therapist schedules rehabilitation sessions for the patient. Every session includes exercises that measure balance strength movement and speech activity. A mobile interface records daily exercise completion and pain feedback from the patient. A web interface allows the therapist to monitor patient progress remotely. Wearable sensors collect movement signals during each exercise session. DataCollection stores sensor readings and patient feedback for later analysis. MedicalEvent records warning signs such as sudden weakness high blood pressure or missed medication. The system generates a report when a medical event or abnormal recovery trend is detected. The report is sent to the doctor and therapist so that the recovery plan can be adjusted.
Class: Patient, Therapist, Doctor, Session, Exercise, Assessment, RecoveryPlan, MedicalEvent, DataCollection, MobileInterface, WebInterface, Sensor, Report
Atributes: Patient [ID, Name], Therapist [ID], Doctor [ID], Session [Date], Exercise [Type], Assessment [Score], RecoveryPlan [Goal], DataCollection [Reading], Report [Status]
Relationship: Patient and Therapist, Patient and Session, Therapist and RecoveryPlan, Sensor and DataCollection, MedicalEvent and Report

Problem: The archive space project manages physical rooms used for preserving institutional documents. An archive contains several rooms that provide controlled storage space. Each room contains shelves for arranging archive boxes. A shelf can store many boxes according to document category and retention period. A box contains documents that must be protected from moisture light and unauthorized access. The catalogue records the location of each document in the archive. An archivist manages preservation activities for fragile documents. A researcher can submit a request to access a document. The request is reviewed before the document is removed from storage. Preservation actions are recorded when a document is cleaned repaired or digitized. The system helps staff track archive space availability and document movement.
Class: Archive, Room, Shelf, Box, Document, Archivist, Researcher, Request, Preservation, Catalogue, Space
Relationship: Archive and Room, Room and Shelf, Shelf and Box, Box and Document, Researcher and Request, Archivist and Preservation
